sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74479" key="o)pisqodro/mos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπισθο-δρόμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74479.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">running backwards,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">83</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
